materials: Needle and thread for sewing eyes, nose...

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook
rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 11, turn, and start working into the second chain from the hook.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc the the last st ( 24)
rounds.summary: Work 9 single crochets, 4 single crochets in the next stitch, 8 single crochets, 3 single crochets in the last stitch.
Increase, 8 single crochets, 4 increases, 8 single crochets, 3 increases.
In the front loops only, work 13 single crochets, 2 increases, 14 single crochets, 2 increases, 1 single crochet.
Work 14 single crochets, 1 increase, 17 single crochets, 1 increase, 3 single crochets.
Work 38 single crochets around for four rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 6-9

rounds.rawInstruction: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.
rounds.summary: Finish off, cut the yarn, and weave in the end.
rounds.title: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11 and do the same with bottom case but R3 do not FLO.
rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 11 and work the same as the bottom case (yellow top case) but for round 3, do not work in the front loops only.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.summary: Work 38 single crochets around for three rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 5-7

rounds.rawInstruction: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.
rounds.summary: Do not cut the yarn. Work 2 more single crochets, then prepare to join the two case pieces.
rounds.title: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.

rounds.rawInstruction: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
rounds.summary: Join the two case pieces using 10 slip stitches, working through the front loops of the top piece and the back loops of the bottom piece.
rounds.title: To join

rounds.rawInstruction: 7sc in MR,do not join, just tie MR
rounds.summary: Work 7 single crochets into a magic ring. Do not join in a round; just tighten the ring.
rounds.title: Foundation

rounds.summary: Work 5 single crochets into a magic ring.
Work 5 single crochets around for two rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 2-3

rounds.summary: Work 2 single crochets on both sides of the piece.
rounds.title: Crochet on both side 2sc

rounds.rawInstruction: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
rounds.summary: Sew the ears, arms, nose, eyes, and cheeks onto the case to complete the project.
rounds.title: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
